ref_source: REF, "UK Renewable Electricity Subsidy Totals 2002 to the Present Day", April 2025, Table 2 (and Capacity column)

components.note: REF counts total CCL receipts (OBR series, all fuels); we count electricity's share of main-rate receipts plus Carbon Price Support. Our figure is expected to be lower.
REF counts total ETS receipts (OBR series, all sectors); we count only the power-sector share of auctioned allowance revenue. Our figure is expected to be much lower.
REF does not net off direct constraint payments; we do. Our figure is expected to be lower.
